descriptionTemplate:
When "Vortice" is in the team, the {Aequor Realm} transforms into {Divine Realm: Aequor}.
{Tentacle DMG} is changed to 5% of the team's Max HP.
Team DMG Amplification +50% after exploration begins (Effect doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners, though no additional starting Tentacles will be obtained).
Tentacle Gathering effect is removed.
{Divine Realm: Tentacle Stance} features the following new effects:
{Divine Realm: Tranquil Sea}: Immediately generate Shield equal to 25% Max HP, and Tentacles will no longer attack at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
{Divine Realm: Raging Waves}: {Tentacle DMG} × 125% for the turn; after dealing Active DMG, 1 Tentacle attacks; lose 1 Tentacle at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
Realm Mastery is counted as {Divine Realm: Aequor Mastery}:
Each point provides: {Tranquil Sea} Stance's Shield Generation +0.025% Max HP. {Raging Waves} Stance's {Tentacle DMG} +0.025%. Effect doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners.
